name: AntV S2

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need hierarchical row and column dimension trees, cross-tabulation, frozen headers, and virtual scrolling across huge numbers of cells instead of a hand-written canvas/table, which fails at pivot coordinates, merged headers, and synchronized scrolling. Do not use it for a small ordinary detail table or an editable spreadsheet.
en.why_valuable: AI can usually assemble only a simple static cross-table; it cannot reliably produce multi-level row and column facets, merged headers, frozen regions, and canvas virtual scrolling. A hand-written multidimensional pivot table has a 0-20% success rate.

data_in.note: data_in is the PivotSheet dataCfg. Every field name in fields must exist on the data row objects, and values must reference numeric measures.

fields.rows: string[] -- row-dimension fields; pass [] when there are no row dimensions
fields.columns: string[] -- column-dimension fields; pass [] when there are no column dimensions

meta?.name?: string -- display name; defaults to field

spec.note: The S2 canvas must receive numeric width/height values. The default height is 400px; do not use vh or percentage heights. boot reads the container clientWidth; if its width is 0 at mount time, render after the container becomes visible.

when_to_use: 需要多层行列维度树、交叉汇总、冻结表头与海量单元格虚拟滚动时用它,而非手写 canvas/table——原生在透视坐标、合并表头和滚动同步上失败;非做普通明细小表或可编辑电子表格。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能静态拼简单交叉表,做不到多级行列 facet、稳定的合并表头、冻结区域与 canvas 虚拟滚动;多维透视表手写成功率为 0-20%。

data_in.note: data_in 就是 PivotSheet 的 dataCfg;fields 中每个字段名都必须存在于 data 行对象,values 指向数值度量。

fields.rows: string[] —— 行维度字段;无行维度时传 []
fields.columns: string[] —— 列维度字段;无列维度时传 []

meta?.name?: string —— 显示名,默认使用 field

spec.note: S2 canvas 必须收到数值 width/height;默认 height 400px,禁用 vh/百分比高。boot 读取容器 clientWidth,若挂载时宽度为 0 应在容器可见后再 render。

example._why: 透视表的 data/fields/meta 三处字段必须互相对齐,minimal 用一个 2×2 透视面固定形状。

uplink: 本条默认只做本地透视探索;消费 AI 若要回传当前单元格或筛选上下文,自行按载体接原生回调,不建立统一事件出口。

carriers.widget: supported:s2.min.css 与 canvas 落 shadow,tooltip.getContainer 显式返回 shadow 内 el 以阻止默认 document.body 外溢
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + canvas + 外链 CSS,无 worker/wasm 硬依赖

isolation.evidence: +esm 实测:`document.createElement('style')` x3 且 `document.head.appendChild(t)`(注入 head);`document.body.appendChild` 其一带 .focus() 的复制 textarea,document.body 共 15 处(tooltip 默认容器);`window.addEventListener('visibilitychange')` 等 x3。widget boot 的 tooltip.getContainer:()=>el 仅挡 tooltip 外溢,head <style> 注入无法经 boot 消除。canvas 本体渲入 shadow 正常,故 conditional。
